sections.title: Kids' Menu
items: Entrees For children 9 and under Penne Pasta - zesty marinara sauce served over fresh penne pasta Grilled Cheese - white bread with American cheese served with your choice of fries, oranges or applesauce Mac & Cheese - creamy cheddar mac & cheese with your choice of fries, oranges or applesauce Confisco's Burger - grilled and served on a sesame seed bun with your choice of fries, oranges or applesauce Chicken Fingers - tender chicken fingers lightly breaded and fried with your choice of fries, oranges or applesauce
